meta.title: The US is building a drone that mimics the J-20 and Su-57
meta.description:
In a recent episode of AirPower, we showed you a clip of our interview with retired Air Force Major General Bob “Lorenzo” Behler — and as gripping as his stories about flying the SR-71 truly are, many eagle-eyed viewers couldn’t help but be distracted by the unusual looking model aircraft on the shelf behind him. 

So, let's talk about it. 

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social
